title: DJ Polarized Z2 Day
description: Extended Z2 ride with strict intensity discipline — no tempo creep
purpose: Pure aerobic base — avoid tempo zone entirely

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% through. This is your workout. Own it. 70% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 70%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 9% complete. 10 minutes left. Zone 2 is like compound interest — boring but effective.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 10 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 10 minutes to go. Consistency over intensity. You're doing the work that matters.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 90:00 at 72%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 9% complete. 10 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 100 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 90% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
